debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (cl : Circuit p (ZMod p)) (cr : Circuit p (ℕ × ZMod p)) (G : List (Entry (ZMod p) (ℕ × ZMod p))),
    wf G cl cr →
      List.Forall (fun entry => entry.l = (Exp.c entry.r.2).eval) G → cl ≈ Clap.Dedup.dedup p inst✝ (ZMod p) cr

set
  case nil => simp [dedup_]; rfl
  case eq0 e c cl cr hw ih =>
    simp [dedup_]; split_ifs with h
    · rw [← ih n set hG]; exact Simulation.sim_eq0_redundant h
    · apply Simulation.sim_eq0; apply ih n _ hG
  case lam k1 k2 hw ih =>
    simp [dedup_]; apply Simulation.sim_lam; intro x; apply ih x (n + 1) set (by simp [hG])
  case share e k1 k2 hw ih =>
    simp [dedup_]; apply Simulation.sim_share; intro x; apply ih x (n + 1) set (by simp [hG])
  case is_zero e k1 k2 hw ih =>
    simp [dedup_]; apply Simulation.sim_is_zero; intro x; apply ih x (n + 1) set (by simp [hG])
  case assert_range w e c cl cr hw ih =>
    simp [dedup_]; apply Simulation.sim_assert_range; apply ih n _ hG

by
  intros cl cr G h_wf h_all
  suffices H : ∀ n set, (∀ e ∈ set, (to_var (cr.map_vars fun (n, v) => (n, v))).eval = 0) → cl ≈ dedup_ cr n set from H 0 [] (by simp)
  induction h_wf <;> intros n set h_set <;> simp [dedup_, *]
  · rename_i e_cl cl' e_cr cr' _ h_e_cl ih; split_ifs with h_in
    · rw [← h_e_cl, Simulation.eq0_zero (h_set _ h_in)]; apply ih; assumption
    · constructor; rw [h_e_cl]; apply ih; intro _ h; cases h
      · rw [← h_e_cl]; assumption
      · apply h_set; assumption
  · rename_i ih; intro x; apply ih; intros; apply h_set; assumption
  · rename_i ih; constructor; [rfl; intro x; apply ih; intros; apply h_set; assumption]
  · rename_i ih; constructor; [rfl; intro x; apply ih; intros; apply h_set; assumption]
  · rename_i e_cl cl' e_cr cr' _ h_e_cl ih; constructor; rw [h_e_cl]; apply ih; intro _ h; cases h
    · rw [← h_e_cl]; assumption
    · apply h_set; assumption

by
  intros cl cr G h hG
  unfold dedup
  have h_eval {el er G} (h : wf_exp G el er) (hG : List.Forall (fun entry => entry.l = entry.r.2) G) : el.eval = (to_var er).eval := by
    induction h <;> simp [Exp.eval, to_var, *]
    case v l r G h_in =>
      induction G with | nil => cases h_in | cons head tail ih =>
        cases h_in with | head => exact hG.1 | tail h_in => exact ih hG.2 h_in
  have : ∀ {cl cr G n set}, wf G cl cr → List.Forall (fun entry => entry.l = entry.r.2) G → (∀ e ∈ set, (to_nat_eval e) = 0) → cl ≈ dedup_ cr n set := by
    intro cl cr G n set h hG h_set
    induction h generalizing n set G with
    | nil => constructor
    | eq0 el er cl cr hwfe _ ih =>
      simp [dedup_]; split_ifs with h_in
      · apply Simulation.eq0_skip (by rw [h_eval hwfe hG, ← hwfe.eval_to_nat]; apply h_set _ h_in) (ih hG h_set)
      · constructor; · rw [h_eval hwfe hG]
        · intro h0; apply ih hG; intro e hi; cases hi with
          | head => rw [← hwfe.eval_to_nat, h_eval hwfe hG, h0]
          | tail hi => apply h_set _ hi
    | lam k1 k2 _ ih => constructor; intro x; apply ih (List.Forall.cons rfl hG) h_set
    | share el er k1 k2 hwfe _ ih => constructor; · rw [h_eval hwfe hG]
      · intro x; apply ih (List.Forall.cons rfl hG) h_set
    | is_zero el er k1 k2 hwfe _ ih => constructor; · rw [h_eval hwfe hG]
      · intro x; apply ih (List.Forall.cons rfl hG) h_set
    | assert_range w el er cl cr hwfe _ ih =>
      simp [dedup_]; split_ifs with h_in
      · apply Simulation.assert_range_skip (by rw [h_eval hwfe hG, ← hwfe.eval_to_nat]; apply h_set _ h_in) (ih hG h_set)
      · constructor; · rw [h_eval hwfe hG]
        · intro h0; apply ih hG; intro e hi; cases hi with
          | head => rw [← hwfe.eval_to_nat, h_eval hwfe hG, h0]
          | tail hi => apply h_set _ hi
  apply this h hG; intro e h; cases h

set
  case nil => rfl
  case eq0 e c _ ih =>
    simp [dedup_]
    split
    · rw [ih]; exact (equiv_eq0_redundant _ _).symm
    · simp [ih]
  case lam k _ ih =>
    apply equiv_lam; intro x; apply ih; simp_all
  case share e k _ ih =>
    apply equiv_share; intro x; apply ih; simp_all
  case is_zero e k _ ih =>
    apply equiv_is_zero; intro x; apply ih; simp_all
  case assert_range w e c _ ih =>
    apply equiv_assert_range; apply ih

by
  intros cl cr G h_wf h_G
  unfold dedup
  induction h_wf generalizing n s <;> simp [dedup_, *]
  case nil => constructor
  case eq0 ih =>
    split
    · exact Equiv.skip_eq0 (by sorry) (ih s n ‹_›)
    · exact Equiv.eq0 (ih _ _ ‹_›)
  case lam ih => exact Equiv.lam (fun x => ih _ _ (by simp [*]) x)
  case share ih => exact Equiv.share (fun x => ih _ _ (by simp [*]) x)
  case is_zero ih => exact Equiv.is_zero (fun x => ih _ _ (by simp [*]) x)
  case assert_range ih => exact Equiv.assert_range (ih _ _ ‹_›)

by
  unfold dedup
  intro cl cr G h_wf h_G
  induction h_wf generalizing set <;>
    simp [dedup_, *] at * <;>
    (try split_ifs) <;>
    (try constructor) <;>
    (try intros; first | assumption | apply_assumption)

by
  intro cl cr G h_wf h_G
  let rec go {cl cr G n set} (h_wf : wf G cl cr) (h_G : List.Forall (fun entry => entry.l = entry.r.2) G) (h_set : ∀ e_nat ∈ set, (e_nat.eval_with_G G) = some 0) : cl ≈ dedup_ cr n set := by
    cases h_wf with
    | nil => constructor
    | eq0 e c h_wf' =>
      simp [dedup_]
      split
      · apply Circuit.Equiv.eq0_redundant
        · apply go h_wf' h_G h_set
        · have := h_set (to_nat e) (by assumption); simp [to_nat, to_var] at *; assumption
      · constructor; rfl; apply go h_wf' h_G; intro e' he'; cases he'
        · simp [to_nat, to_var] at *; assumption
        · apply h_set _ (by assumption)
    | lam k_l k_r h_wf' =>
      constructor; intro x; apply go (h_wf' x) (List.Forall.cons rfl h_G); intro e' he'; apply h_set _ he'
    | share e k_l k_r h_wf' =>
      constructor; rfl; intro x; apply go (h_wf' x) (List.Forall.cons rfl h_G); intro e' he'; apply h_set _ he'
    | is_zero e k_l k_r h_wf' =>
      constructor; rfl; intro x; apply go (h_wf' x) (List.Forall.cons rfl h_G); intro e' he'; apply h_set _ he'
    | assert_range w e c h_wf' =>
      simp [dedup_]; split
      · apply Circuit.Equiv.assert_range_redundant
        · apply go h_wf' h_G h_set
        · sorry
      · constructor; rfl; apply go h_wf' h_G; intro e' he'; cases he'
        · sorry
        · apply h_set _ (by assumption)
  exact go h_wf h_G (by simp)
set <;> simp [dedup, dedup_] <;> try split_ifs <;> try constructor <;> intros <;> try assumption

by
  intros cl cr G h_wf h_G
  let h_S_prop (set : List (Exp (ZMod p) ℕ)) (G : List (Entry (ZMod p) (ℕ × ZMod p))) :=
    ∀ e_nat ∈ set, ∃ e_orig, to_nat e_orig = e_nat ∧ (to_var e_orig).eval G = 0
  suffices ∀ n set (h_G' : List.Forall (fun entry => entry.l = (Exp.eval entry.r.2)) G) (h_S : h_S_prop set G), cl ≈ dedup_ cr n set from this 0 [] h_G (by intro e hE; cases hE)
  induction h_wf generalizing n set
  case nil => intros; simp [dedup_]; exact Sim.nil
  case eq0 eL eR cl cr hE hW ih =>
    intros hG hS; simp [dedup_]; split_ifs with hM
    · apply Sim.eq0_inv
      · obtain ⟨e_orig, h_nat, h_eval⟩ := hS (to_nat eR) hM
        rw [← h_eval, ← hE]; congr; exact h_nat
      · apply ih hG hS
    · apply Sim.eq0 hE
      apply ih hG; intro e' hM'; cases hM'
      · exists eR; simp; rw [hE]; exact rfl
      · apply hS; assumption
  case lam kL kR hW ih =>
    intros hG hS; apply Sim.lam; intro x
    apply ih (by constructor; rfl; assumption)
    intro e' hE'; obtain ⟨e_o, h_n, h_v⟩ := hS e' hE'; exists e_o; simp [h_n, h_v]
  case share eL eR kL kR hE hW ih =>
    intros hG hS; apply Sim.share hE; intro x
    apply ih (by constructor; rfl; assumption)
    intro e' hE'; obtain ⟨e_o, h_n, h_v⟩ := hS e' hE'; exists e_o; simp [h_n, h_v]
  case is_zero eL eR kL kR hE hW ih =>
    intros hG hS; apply Sim.is_zero hE; intro x
    apply ih (by constructor; rfl; assumption)
    intro e' hE'; obtain ⟨e_o, h_n, h_v⟩ := hS e' hE'; exists e_o; simp [h_n, h_v]
  case assert_range w eL eR cl cr hE hW ih =>
    intros hG hS; simp [dedup_]; apply Sim.assert_range hE
    apply ih hG; intro e' hM'; cases hM'
    · exists eR; simp; rw [hE]; exact rfl -- Note: assert_range might not imply eval=0, see Dedup implementation TODO
    · apply hS; assumption

  generalize hn : 0 = n
